title: Spicy Creamy Raw Middle Eastern Steak Fillet Stir-fry
description: A post-workout-friendly dish featuring a raw-friendly spicy and creamy preparation of steak fillet, ideal for those who enjoy bold flavors with tender results.

ingredients.name: Steak Fillet
ingredients.notes: Thawed or chilled, preferably cooked and left to cool

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine tomato paste, olive oil, cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well until the mixture is smooth.
If using red pepper flakes, add to the bowl for an extra kick of heat.
Place the thawed or chilled steak fillet in a shallow container and pour the spice paste over it. Seal with plastic wrap or aluminum foil, ensuring all surfaces are covered.
Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to overnight, depending on preference.
Once marinated, heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. When hot, add steak fillet and cook until desired doneness is reached (usually about 2-4 minutes per side).
While the steak cooks, prepare the sauce by whisking together fresh dill leaves with remaining marinade to create a smooth sauce.
Spoon some of the prepared sauce over the cooked steak. Garnish with additional fresh dill if desired.
Serve hot immediately as a snack or as part of a meal.
